channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drug dealing, 23rd July
item.description:
Drug dealing taking place at all times of the day and my friend has a young child that lives on that street. And feels worried and threatened by this activity.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Alban's Place, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wooden fence, 23rd July
item.description:
Another Ragu tag. On wooden fence to the right of black shutters shown in photo. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Flaxman Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 90 , Willesden Lane, 23rd July
item.description:
The morning and evening collectors are deliberately leaving a bag on floor outside 90 ,Willesden’s lane near bus stop . The team pick up other bags but leave this bag and it is attracting flys . This Has been going on for 3 days.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over, 23rd July
item.description:
Gas street cleaning stopped in Lambeth? Clapham Common is also filthy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sun lounger camp bed dumped road, 23rd July
item.description:
Constant fly tipping in area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch too big to cut down. Fairoak Drive,SE92QQ, 23rd July
item.description:
Fallen branch in Fairoak Drive Green area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairoak Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal camp, 23rd July
item.description:
Someone has been sleeping and living in the green at the back of Patricia court and has left all this mess
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Patricia Court, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken mirror glass left on pavement, 23rd July
item.description:
The people moved out, they left a mirror outside which smashed onto the pavement, now the smashed pieces are in 2 boxes, but very sharp and dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cantwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on grass outside number 29, 23rd July
item.description:
Constant dog fouling on the grass in this area. Can we please have a sign posted on the treee?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Woods Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ash tree growing dangerously close to foundation of building, 23rd July
item.description:
How has this been allowed to grow so high? The roots will no doubt be causing damage to the flats foundation soon if not already. is located behind Shaftesbury court
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same property fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Same property fly tipping. Just leaving their rubbish on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic monitoring cable broken, 23rd July
item.description:
Traffic monitoring cables were recently installed around the area, and one of the pair of cables on Parkview road has snapped/broken off the street surface. Thought I’d raise as it’s just trailing loose on the ground and presumably will impact the traffic monitoring data being collected
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkview Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish left outside school gates, 23rd July
item.description:
This bag of rubbish has been left outside Leigh Academy school gates in Limewood Road, Erith. It has been there for a couple of weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limewood Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite #49 Donaldson Rd, 23rd July
item.description:
Someone dumped a Farrow & Ball opened pot of paint outside our house.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Graffiti, 23rd July
item.description:
Black graffiti on bike shelter at this location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 425, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 23rd July
item.description:
Various pieces of wood and bits and pieces left by and around street sign at this location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 425, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This fence has been reported at least four times now and is a health and safety issue as it is about to fall onto a public path, 23rd July
item.description:
This fence has been falling onto the public path for a long time. We have reported it multiple times and the reports get removed without action being taken. It is falling on to a public lane and specific slats are now also falling down with nails on them. The fence opposite it is also now starting to fall down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Casino Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of clothes and car tyres corner of Willesden lane and Winchester avenue, 23rd July
item.description:
Attracts vermin and health hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: East Dulwich Grove - tree needs trimming around base, 23rd July
item.description:
Beginning to block pavement here and trees along the road. Nearest 2 Arnhem Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Arnhem Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defaced sign, 23rd July
item.description:
Sign has been spray painted

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
